benchmark.headline: Weak Financial Foundation vs synthetic peer benchmark

scenarioCards.title: Downside shock
scenarioCards.thesis: A repeat shock to the current largest reported revenue category would test the weak financial foundation stance immediately.
scenarioCards.effectOnRisk: Recommendation pressure increases
scenarioCards.effectOnRecommendation: Unavailable

scenarioCards.title: Reserve or bridge support
scenarioCards.thesis: Closing the runway gap of -46.46 months is the fastest path to stabilization.
scenarioCards.effectOnRisk: Runway support can materially improve the case
scenarioCards.effectOnRecommendation: Best fit when liquidity is the binding constraint

scenarioCards.title: Diversification improvement
scenarioCards.thesis: Moving diversification by +0.02 toward benchmark can change how resilient this case looks.
scenarioCards.effectOnRisk: Diversification is already comparatively healthy
scenarioCards.effectOnRecommendation: Most relevant when revenue concentration dominates the case

recommendation.rationale: Use this synthetic weak financial foundation case to demonstrate how Northstar connects financial signals to an advisor workflow.
caveats: Confirm current audited statements, restrictions, and management context before acting.
Treat peer and scenario deltas as directional decision support, not causal estimates.
recommendation.exportSummary: Housing Case 01 is a synthetic weak financial foundation demonstration case.

organizations.memoText: Health Care Case 18 is a synthetic demonstration case based on transformed public Form 990 patterns. Review peer benchmarks, evidence confidence, and scenario assumptions before drawing conclusions.

benchmark.headline: Revenue Concentration Risk vs synthetic peer benchmark

scenarioCards.title: Downside shock
scenarioCards.thesis: A repeat shock to the current largest reported revenue category would test the revenue concentration risk stance immediately.
scenarioCards.effectOnRisk: Recommendation pressure increases
scenarioCards.effectOnRecommendation: Unavailable

scenarioCards.title: Reserve or bridge support
scenarioCards.thesis: Closing the runway gap of +61.39 months is the fastest path to stabilization.
scenarioCards.effectOnRisk: Reserve support is additive rather than critical
scenarioCards.effectOnRecommendation: Best fit when liquidity is the binding constraint

scenarioCards.title: Diversification improvement
scenarioCards.thesis: Moving diversification by +0.41 toward benchmark can change how resilient this case looks.
scenarioCards.effectOnRisk: Diversification improvement can de-risk the case
scenarioCards.effectOnRecommendation: Most relevant when revenue concentration dominates the case

recommendation.rationale: Use this synthetic revenue concentration risk case to demonstrate how Northstar connects financial signals to an advisor workflow.
caveats: Confirm current audited statements, restrictions, and management context before acting.
Treat peer and scenario deltas as directional decision support, not causal estimates.
recommendation.exportSummary: Health Care Case 18 is a synthetic revenue concentration risk demonstration case.
